task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'kubectl create namespace legacy-billing' or 'kubectl get ns' listing 'legacy-billing', or Rancher UI displaying the 'legacy-billing' namespace.

task_completion.description: Verify the Ingress manifest was updated to the modern API and schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the ingress YAML with 'apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1', 'pathType' specified (e.g., Prefix), and backend structured as 'service: name: <name> port: number: 8080'.

task_completion.description: Verify the HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifest was updated to the modern API and schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the HPA YAML with 'apiVersion: autoscaling/v2' and a 'metrics' array specifying target 'averageUtilization: 75'.

task_completion.description: Verify the PodDisruptionBudget manifest was updated to the modern API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the PodDisruptionBudget YAML with 'apiVersion: policy/v1'.

task_completion.description: Verify all manifests were successfully applied to the cluster in the correct namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'kubectl apply' with output indicating resources were created/configured in the 'legacy-billing' namespace, or Rancher UI showing the active workloads (Deployment, Ingress, HPA, PDB) running in 'legacy-billing'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually modified the files in the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) or file manipulation commands (like sed) modifying the files in '/home/ga/Desktop/legacy-billing-manifests/'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Kubernetes cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing actual execution and output of 'kubectl' commands or a browser showing the live Rancher UI, rather than mocked text files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent deployed to the required namespace and didn't take shortcuts using the default namespace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The applied resources must explicitly show they are in the 'legacy-billing' namespace, either via '-n legacy-billing' in the apply command, namespace declarations in the YAMLs, or Rancher UI namespace filters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace is 'legacy-billing'. Expected ingress host is 'billing.internal.company.com' with service port 8080. Expected HPA utilization is 75.
